items.title: Roundup: Finland's nuclear weapons ban lift plan sparks broad debate

While we’ve seen it go a bit lower in the past, you’re still looking at a solid $30 markdown here that lets you upgrade your media viewing experience at the second-best price of 2026 and the third-best overall. If you want to get the same reactive backlighting for your TVs of 40 to 85 inches in size while saving a bit more without the smart light bars in the above package, you can find Govee’s three standard TV Backlight 3 Lite sizes starting from $54.99 shipped right now.
